hero.desc: I am a backend developer focused on transforming manual processes into automated systems, integrating APIs and creating scalable solutions that generate real results.
about.name: Henrique W. T. Dias
about.bio.part1: I am a developer focused on backend, building APIs, automations, and integrations between systems. I work with Python, Node.js and databases, developing solutions that solve real problems — such as automated workflows, communication between services, and data handling.
about.bio.part2: I am interested in system architecture, scalability and artificial intelligence, and I am continuously improving in building robust applications. I am looking for my first opportunity as a developer to apply in practice what I have been developing.
about.facts.stack.label: Python | Node.js
about.facts.specialties.label: APIs and Automation
about.facts.experience.label: As a dev at IME-Jr
projects.neuropost.title: NeuroPost
projects.clientmanager.title: ClientManager
projects.acervopet.title: Acervo Pet
projects.automation.title: Enterprise Automation
projects.neuropost.desc: Fullstack platform with authentication, user-based file storage, and AI image generation. Includes a structured REST API and NoSQL database integration.
projects.clientmanager.desc: Appointment scheduling system with calendar management and chatbot automations. Integrates n8n, Redis, and WhatsApp for automated client communication.
projects.acervopet.desc: Digital archive platform developed in partnership with the IME-Jr junior company. System with authentication and document storage using a relational database.
projects.automation.desc: Internal automation system that sends weekly updates to company members. Uses n8n and Google Cloud for workflow orchestration, ensuring scalable and reliable automation processes.
timeline.item1.title: Start of Degree
timeline.item1.description: Started a Computer Science degree, focusing on software development, programming logic, and system fundamentals.
timeline.item2.title: Practical Experience
timeline.item2.description: Worked on real projects within the junior enterprise, developing solutions focused on backend, automation, and system integration.
timeline.item3.title: First Freelance
timeline.item3.description: Developed a scheduling system with calendar management and chatbot automation, including integration with external services.
